nasb.text: Then Eli would bless Elkanah and his wife and say, “May the Lord give you children from this woman in place of the one she dedicated to the Lord.” And they went to their own home.

esv.text: Then Eli would bless Elkanah and his wife, and say, “May the Lord give you children by this woman for the petition she asked of the Lord.” So then they would return to their home.

cnv.text: 以利給以利加拿和他的妻子祝福，說：“願耶和華從這婦人身上還給你後裔，代替你獻給耶和華的孩子。”他們就回自己的地方去了。

ccb.text: 以利祝福以利加拿和他妻子，对他说：“愿耶和华让你妻子再给你生儿育女，代替她求来并献给耶和华的孩子。”他们就回家去了。
